requirement_topic.en: SSEC Grid and Site Power Connection — 230/400 V, 50 Hz
requirement_topic.zh: SSEC电网及场站供电接入——230/400 V、50 Hz
requirement_topic.zht: SSEC電網及場站供電接入——230/400 V、50 Hz

summary.en: South Sudan's electricity sector is at an early stage, with very low electrification and many loads supplied through diesel generation, isolated systems, donor projects, or site-owned power rather than a dense national distribution network. South Sudan Electricity Corporation (SSEC) is the national utility reference for grid-connected supply. The practical low-voltage design basis should be treated as 230 V single-phase / 400 V three-phase at 50 Hz, with the actual site supply, neutral and earthing arrangement, voltage stability, generator or microgrid operating mode, metering, and protection coordination confirmed project by project.
summary.zh: 南苏丹电力行业仍处于早期阶段，电气化率很低，许多负荷依赖柴油发电、孤立系统、援助项目或场站自有电源，而不是密集的全国配电网络。南苏丹电力公司（SSEC）是并网供电的国家公用事业参考方。实务低压设计基线应按230 V单相 / 400 V三相、50 Hz处理，并须逐项目确认实际场站供电、中性点和接地方式、电压稳定性、发电机或微网运行模式、计量和保护配合。
summary.zht: 南蘇丹電力行業仍處於早期階段，電氣化率很低，許多負荷依賴柴油發電、孤立系統、援助項目或場站自有電源，而不是密集的全國配電網絡。南蘇丹電力公司（SSEC）是併網供電的國家公用事業參考方。實務低壓設計基線應按230 V單相 / 400 V三相、50 Hz處理，並須逐項目確認實際場站供電、中性點和接地方式、電壓穩定性、發電機或微網運行模式、計量和保護配合。

standards_or_laws: South Sudan Electricity Corporation (SSEC) project connection and site-acceptance requirements where applicable
South Sudan low-voltage supply basis: 230/400 V, 50 Hz
IEC 61000 series — electromagnetic compatibility and power quality
IEC 61851-1 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — General requirements

summary.en: China domestic charger installations are commonly validated under GB/T 18487.1-2023, GB/T 20234 connector standards, GB/T 27930-2023 for DC charging communication, and local grid-operator project acceptance. China's nominal low-voltage baseline is 220 V single-phase / 380 V three-phase at 50 Hz. South Sudan shares the 50 Hz frequency but uses a different nominal voltage basis of 230/400 V, so China 220/380 V settings and certificates should not be presented as a direct grid match.
summary.zh: 中国国内充电桩安装通常依据GB/T 18487.1-2023、GB/T 20234接口标准、直流充电通信GB/T 27930-2023，以及当地电网运营商项目验收进行验证。中国标称低压基线为220 V单相 / 380 V三相、50 Hz。南苏丹与中国同为50 Hz，但标称电压基线为230/400 V，与中国不同，因此不应将中国220/380 V设置和证书表述为直接电网匹配。
summary.zht: 中國國內充電樁安裝通常依據GB/T 18487.1-2023、GB/T 20234接口標準、直流充電通訊GB/T 27930-2023，以及當地電網運營商項目驗收進行驗證。中國標稱低壓基線為220 V單相 / 380 V三相、50 Hz。南蘇丹與中國同為50 Hz，但標稱電壓基線為230/400 V，與中國不同，因此不應將中國220/380 V設置和證書表述為直接電網匹配。

standards_or_laws: China local grid operator project-acceptance requirements

gap.en: Exporters must validate the charger input range, over/under-voltage thresholds, leakage-current protection, metering accuracy, harmonic emissions, surge protection, generator compatibility, and thermal behaviour for 230/400 V at 50 Hz and for weak-grid or diesel-backed operation. SSEC or the site power owner should confirm available capacity, earthing, metering, load management, and commissioning requirements. China 220/380 V evidence has frequency alignment only; the voltage differs and must be rechecked.
gap.zh: 出口商须针对230/400 V、50 Hz以及弱电网或柴油备用供电工况验证充电桩输入范围、过/欠压阈值、漏电保护、计量精度、谐波排放、浪涌保护、发电机兼容性和热行为。SSEC或场站电力业主应确认可用容量、接地、计量、负载管理和调试要求。中国220/380 V证据仅在频率上相同；电压不同，必须重新核查。
gap.zht: 出口商須針對230/400 V、50 Hz以及弱電網或柴油備用供電工況驗證充電樁輸入範圍、過/欠壓閾值、漏電保護、計量精度、諧波排放、浪湧保護、發電機兼容性和熱行為。SSEC或場站電力業主應確認可用容量、接地、計量、負載管理和調試要求。中國220/380 V證據僅在頻率上相同；電壓不同，必須重新核查。

mandatory_status.target: Project-specific — SSEC or site-owner connection approval is required where the charger connects to a utility, mini-grid, generator-backed system, or donor-funded site; verify requirements for the specific location
mandatory_status.cn: China local grid operator acceptance applies domestically and is not an SSEC or South Sudan site-power approval substitute; 220/380 V evidence must be revalidated for 230/400 V

source.publisher: South Sudan National Bureau of Standards / South Sudan public standards reference

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] South Sudan charger projects should be validated for 230/400 V, 50 Hz and for the actual SSEC, mini-grid, generator, or off-grid site supply. The 50 Hz frequency aligns with China, but the 230/400 V nominal voltage does not match China's 220/380 V baseline.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 南苏丹充电桩项目应按230/400 V、50 Hz以及实际SSEC、微网、发电机或离网站点供电条件进行验证。50 Hz频率与中国一致，但230/400 V标称电压不同于中国220/380 V基线。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 南蘇丹充電樁項目應按230/400 V、50 Hz以及實際SSEC、微網、發電機或離網站點供電條件進行驗證。50 Hz頻率與中國一致，但230/400 V標稱電壓不同於中國220/380 V基線。
